expectations.text: Email has a clear subject line about project status
Progress is quantified (3 of 6 weeks, or ~50%)
expectations.evidence: '3 weeks into our 6-week engagement, hitting the halfway point'

expectations.text: Completed work (wireframes) and next phase (visual design) are clearly stated
expectations.evidence: 'Wireframes for all pages finalized' and 'Visual design phase begins'

expectations.text: The API integration risk is flagged with its potential impact (extra week)
expectations.evidence: 'API integration may require an additional week...total timeline would extend to 7 weeks'

expectations.text: Output is plain text without markdown formatting (per email drafting rules)
